company.name: ikku47
company.longDescription: I'm a Full Stack Web Developer with nearly 8 years of experience, specialising in building minimal, magical, and meaningful digital experiences. Based in Dubai, UAE, I currently co-found and lead the technical direction at Joyboy.ae.
company.detailedDescription:
I'm a Full Stack Web Developer with nearly 8 years of experience, specialising in building minimal, magical, and meaningful digital experiences. Based in Dubai, UAE, I currently co-found and lead the technical direction at Joyboy.ae — a full-service digital agency focused on web/app development, UI/UX, Web3, and AI-powered products.

I'm a frontend visionary at heart — obsessed with Apple-style design sensibility, silky performance, and pixel-perfect craft. When I'm not shipping code, I'm tinkering with AI, exploring spatial computing, or deep in a cinema binge.
company.footerText: Based in Dubai, UAE. Co-founding and leading technical direction at Joyboy.ae.

experience.description: Developed and deployed APIs to integrate lottery systems, Cocos games, and ElectronJS-based chat applications. Optimized Core Web Vitals and Lighthouse scores for React/Next.js frontends on Vercel. Implemented reusable component architectures using TypeScript and Zustand, reducing dev time by 40%.

Led 15+ person teams in Flutter and JavaScript projects, delivering high-value blockchain web apps with million-dollar USDT turnover. Engineered reusable UI components that slashed development time by 50%.
Contributed to Caratlane's e-commerce project using microservices architecture. Developed, tested, and documented REST and GraphQL APIs. Managed CRON jobs for generating e-commerce reports.

Managed full lifecycle of web applications including live tracking, ML OCR, and auction platforms. Proficient in MongoDB/MySQL with Mongoose/Sequelize. Translated client needs into robust application designs.
Contributed to projects involving XML financial document management. Demonstrated strong organizational skills, prioritizing tasks for timely project completion in collaborative environments.
Native Android development using Java, focusing on building high-performance mobile applications and implementing complex UI designs.

testimonials.text: Edu's attention to detail and technical expertise transformed our vision into a stunning, functional reality.
testimonials.author: Client Name
